summary: Completed testing of SnapRoad Mobile App new features: Stripe Payment Integration, /driver web app tabs. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend /driver page verified with all 4 navigation tabs (Map, Routes, Rewards, Profile) working correctly.

issues: Console warning: validateDOMNesting - button nested inside button at line ~152 - cosmetic issue not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ GET /api/payments/plans - Returns all 3 plans: basic (free), premium ($10.99/mo), family ($14.99/mo)
✓ POST /api/payments/checkout/session (premium) - Creates Stripe checkout URL successfully
✓ POST /api/payments/checkout/session (family) - Creates Stripe checkout URL successfully
✓ POST /api/payments/checkout/session (basic) - Correctly rejects free plan with 400 error
✓ GET /api/badges - Returns badges array format correctly
✓ GET /api/user/car - Returns car data with category, variant, color
✓ /driver Map tab - OpenStreetMap with CartoDB dark tiles, offer markers, Nearby Offers panel
✓ /driver Routes tab - My Routes screen with Add Route functionality
✓ /driver Rewards tab - Sub-tabs: Offers, Challenges, Badges, Car Studio - all visible
✓ /driver Profile tab - Sub-tabs: Overview, Score, Fuel, Settings - all visible
MOCKED: All data except Stripe is mock data - no live Supabase connection
STRIPE: Real test mode integration working (pk_test_* / sk_test_* keys)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All tabs and features rendered correctly

seed_data_creation: Used API calls to set plan and car selection for bypassing onboarding
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment integration fully tested. Stripe checkout URLs are being generated correctly for premium and family plans. /driver app has 4 main tabs (Map/Routes/Rewards/Profile) with sub-tabs in Rewards and Profile. To test main app after onboarding, POST to /api/user/plan with {plan:'basic'} and POST to /api/user/car.
mocked_api_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED except Stripe integration which uses real test mode keys. Mock data from services/mock_data.py.

backend_tests: GET /api/payments/plans - PASS (returns basic, premium, family plans)
frontend_tests: Map Tab: OpenStreetMap with 20 tiles loaded, offer markers visible, Nearby Offers panel
Routes Tab: Renders with My Routes screen, Add Route button
Rewards Tab: All 4 sub-tabs visible (Offers, Challenges, Badges, Car Studio)
Profile Tab: All 4 sub-tabs visible (Overview, Score, Fuel, Settings)
Navigation: All 4 bottom tabs (Map, Routes, Rewards, Profile) clickable and working
